column1: # Source: 435E_21_STR-BK-S column schedule (S-016.00) + model dump v5. UTF-8 BOM. From CSV -> Run.
# REINF: [1]12x12 8(3x3)#4 noTie ends5 mid10 | [2]14x14 8(3x3)#4+tie ends6 mid12 | [3]16x16 12(4x4)#4 ends8 mid16.
#  * Coaxial same-size -> all bars Cranked (30d pen
#  * Asymmetric/offset/rotated transition -> bars on the FLUSH faces Cranked to the real upper-cage
#    positions (LongCrankTargets); bars on the FAR face(s) (largest lower/upper outer-face gap) BENT
#    into slab; the perfectly-aligned bar falls back to the symmetric 1-dia crank (LongCrankUpperInset)
#    so its crank is not degenerate. The UPPER column gets STRAIGHT Column-host starter dowels only at
#    the bent positions (DowelPositions) lapping 30d into the lower col and 30d up into the upper cage.
#  * Top of stack -> bars Bent outward into slab 10d. Cover 1.5". Tie hook 135.
# --- Coaxial same-size stack -> all bars Cranked ---
# C1.3: + 3 straight Column-host dowels (idx 4 5 7) lapping C1.2 below
# C5.4: + 3 straight Column-host dowels (idx 3 4 5) lapping C5.3 below
# C6.3: + 3 straight Column-host dowels (idx 3 4 6) lapping C6.2 below
# C7.4: + 3 straight Column-host dowels (idx 2 5 7) lapping C7.3 below
# C12.5: + 3 straight Column-host dowels (idx 0 1 2) lapping C12.4 below
